channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Chinese Tech Firm DeepSeek Accused of Copying ChatGPT Technology
item.description: A Chinese tech firm, DeepSeek, is accused of copying the technology behind ChatGPT, a popular AI model developed by OpenAI. The allegations have sparked a reexamination of the assumptions that led to a panic in the US over DeepSeek's advancements.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien And Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: DeepSeek marks 'turning point' for global AI race: Former Google CEO
item.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt said Tuesday that the rise of DeepSeek, the Chinese startup behind a new artificial intelligence (AI) model taking the internet by storm, marks a “turning point” for the global AI race. In a Washington Post op-ed with MakerMaker.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: NordVPN launches new “revolutionary” censorship-resistant VPN protocol
item.description: NordWhisper is designed to work against the most challenging network filtering techniques. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Many animals and plants are losing their genetic diversity, making them more vulnerable
item.description: Two-thirds of animal and plant populations are declining in genetic diversity, which makes it harder to adapt to environmental changes.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Are we all aliens? NASA's returned asteroid samples hold the ingredients of life from a watery world
item.description: A NASA spacecraft has returned asteroid samples that hold not only the pristine building blocks for life but also the salty remains of an ancient water world.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity
item.description: Digital identity advocates are calling on Trump administration to boost the use of mobile drivers licenses and other digital identity verification use cases. The post Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Windows 11: A guide to the updates
item.description: A Windows launch isn’t the end a process — it’s really just the beginning. Microsoft continually works on improving Windows 11 by fixing bugs, releasing security patches, and occasionally adding new features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Knowledge graphs: the missing link in enterprise AI
item.description: Large language models (LLMs) are good at learning from unstructured data. But a lot of the proprietary value that enterprises hold is locked up inside relational databases, spreadsheets, and other structured file types.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: World’s largest pulp manufacturer streamlined SAP S/4HANA integration for better outcomes
item.description: Cloud-based enterprise resource planning solutions are transforming and enhancing business operations. Yet despite the organisational benefits, businesses are slow to modernise IT, citing challenges in integrating legacy systems due to change management and user adoption issues.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Boom Supersonic's XB-1 Breaks Sound Barrier in Historic Test Flight
item.description: Boom Supersonic's XB-1 becomes the first privately funded airplane to break the sound barrier during a test flight over the Mojave Desert, northwest of Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Top 8 outages of 2024
item.description: Network outages continued to plague organizations of all sizes in 2024, with major incidents exposing vulnerabilities in digital infrastructure and the growing complexity of IT environments, according to ThousandEyes’ recent Internet outage report.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Disabling, narrowing Apple Intelligence is just a few swipes away
item.description: A suite of artificial intelligence features is enabled automatically with Monday’s release of iOS 18.3.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: Perplexity AI’s new bid for TikTok could give U.S. 50% stake
item.description: Perplexity AI has presented a new proposal to TikTok’s parent company that would allow the U.S. government to own up to 50% of a new entity that merges Perplexity with TikTok’s U.S. business, according to a person familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Outsmart hackers who are out to steal your identity
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers tips on how to protect your identity: Be vigilant, monitor accounts, use smart security, know theft response.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Its most recent mega-acquisition is its $28 billion purchase of Splunk, a bold move that adds revenue opportunities in observability, data analytics, AIOps, and genAI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 11 cutting-edge programming languages to learn now
item.description: A clean slate. A fresh start. The new broom sweeps clean. The folk sayings are in agreement. Sure, your favorite old programming language is comfortable and easy to use. You know the APIs and libraries backward and forward. But you also know all the glitches, bugs, and failure modes that go with it.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Biggest Wi-Fi mistakes you can make on a plane
item.description: It's hard to imagine life without in-flight Wi-Fi these days – but sky-high web surfing comes with its own set of privacy concerns. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Allstate sued for allegedly tracking and selling 45M Americans' location data
item.description: Many apps unrelated to location still ask users for tracking permission, and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed a lawsuit seeking to end this alleged practice by Allstate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Musk vs. Altman
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: People are hawking TikTok-loaded phones for thousands on eBay, Facebook
item.description: People are listing phones preloaded with TikTok for tens of thousands of dollars on eBay, Facebook marketplace and other online storefronts — though it is not clear if there are many buyers at those prices. TikTok was briefly unavailable to U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: The NSA says do these 5 things with your phone right now
item.description: Here are five easy smartphone rules from the National Security Agency that you can follow to better protect your mobile device from hackers and scammers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Data center growth puts unprecedented pressure on power grids
item.description: US data centers will need 55 gigawatts of new power capacity within the next five years, according to a report released this week by Bloom Energy. The report, based on a survey of 100 data center leaders, also shows that 30% of all sites will be using onsite power by 2030.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: FortiGate admins advised to run a compromise assessment
item.description: Network administrators with Fortinet’s FortiGate next generation firewall in their IT environments are being warned to thoroughly scrutinize systems for possible compromise, following last week’s dump of stolen configuration and VPN credentials by a threat actor.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Palo Alto Networks firewalls have UEFI flaws, Secure Boot bypasses
item.description: Researchers have discovered that next-generation firewalls from Palo Alto Networks contain years-old known vulnerabilities in their UEFI firmware — a finding that provides yet more evidence of a broader issue with specialized devices today.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Spain's leader wants the EU to ‘make social media great again.’ Here's how
item.description: DAVOS, Switzerland (AP) — Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez is launching a crusade against what he sees as the downsides of social media.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON and JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to cope when disasters strip away photos, heirlooms and other pieces of the past
item.description: They’re the possessions that tell your story: the photos of old friends and relatives. The ring your mom left you. The hand-knit Christmas stockings. Your grandfather's secretary desk and the letters inside.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pakistan's parliament passes bill with sweeping controls on social media
item.description: ISLAMABAD (AP) — Pakistan’s lower house of parliament on Thursday passed a controversial bill that will give the government sweeping controls on social media, including sending users to prison for spreading disinformation.
item.dc:creator: MUNIR AHMED, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Screen breaks and the right desk setup offer relief from work-related eye strain
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The trouble started every day at around 3 p.m., after Cathy Higgins had spent five or six hours staring at an array of computer screens at her desk. Her university job overseeing research projects involved peering closely at numbers and details on contracts, applications and budgets.
item.dc:creator: CATHY BUSSEWITZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to delete Facebook, Instagram and Threads if you don't like Meta's changes
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Should I stay or should I go — from Meta's social media platforms? That's what some Facebook, Instagram and Threads users are wondering after Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's announcement this month that the company is relaxing rules on harmful content such as hate speech and abandoning its
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Musk clashes with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Trump-supported Stargate AI data center project
item.description: Elon Musk is clashing with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over the Stargate artificial intelligence infrastructure project touted by President Donald Trump, the latest in a feud between the two tech billionaires that started on OpenAI's board and is now testing Musk's influence with the new president.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4
